display_description.he: נתוני הלמ"ס — מדד המחירים, דיור, תעסוקה ונתונים כלכליים
display_description.en: Access Israeli Central Bureau of Statistics (CBS) data including CPI, housing price indices, economic indicators, and demographic data. Use when user asks about Israeli statistics, "hamadad", CPI, consumer price index, housing prices, "madad mchirei dirot", GDP, unemployment, population data, CBS data, "halishka hamerkazit listatistika", producer prices, building starts, or any Israeli economic/demographic statistics. Enhances israel-statistics-mcp server with index interpretation and economic context. Do NOT use for non-Israeli statistics or financial forecasting.
